title: orthopichonia visciflua
intro: Orthopichonia visciflua is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. Orthopichonia visciflua is believed to have various health benefits, such as treating fever, wounds, and skin infections, as well as relieving pain and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of Orthopichonia visciflua include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
